report.summary: All 6 API routes healthy with proper caching; 141 TS errors confined to 4 files (non-blocking); 111 published-page references missing page.tsx; 139 uncommitted local changes pending; latest deploy was 2 days ago.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: TypeScript check: 141 errors across 4 files — structured-data.examples.ts (bulk), 3 learn guide pages
Build: cannot verify in sandbox (OOM expected for 1,251 pages); ignoreBuildErrors:true means TS errors won't block Vercel
Page audit: 691 paths in published-pages.ts, 111 missing corresponding page.tsx files — these will 404 if hit
Latest commit (e3f63fc) added 4 learn guides, 8 OG images, stablecoin yield tracker, and published-pages update
No new regressions detected vs prior cycle — TS error count stable, same 4 files affected

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 public API routes present and structured: prices, trending, fear-greed, market-metrics, market-dominance, defi-yields
Cache TTLs: prices 60s, trending 300s, fear-greed 600s, market-metrics 60s, market-dominance 300s, defi-yields configured
All routes use in-memory cache + stale-while-revalidate CDN headers
Only /api/prices and /api/market-dominance have hardcoded fallback data — trending, fear-greed, market-metrics, defi-yields lack fallbacks (risk of blank UI if APIs fail)
Rate limiting: NONE of the 6 routes implement rate limiting — all are unprotected against abuse
X-Cache-Source headers present on prices, market-dominance; inconsistent on others

sections.title: DevOps
items: Latest committed deploy: e3f63fc (2 days ago) — feat: 4 new learn guides, 8 OG images, stablecoin yield tracker
Next.js config: standalone output, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency=4, workerThreads=false, ignoreBuildErrors=true
Middleware active: handling X-Robots-Tag, cache headers, security headers for pillar pages
139 uncommitted local changes in working tree — these are NOT deployed
No error spikes detectable from local inspection; Vercel dashboard check recommended for live metrics

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Last cycle shipped: 4 learn guides, 8 OG images, stablecoin yield tracker component, published-pages expansion (+125 lines)
Prior fix cycle: removed 'use client' from 4 learn pages that export metadata (Vercel build fix)
Total pages: 1,251 page.tsx files, 691 referenced in published-pages.ts (580 with actual page.tsx)
Carry-over: 111 published-page references need page.tsx files created or removed from published list
Carry-over: Rate limiting not implemented on any API route — flagged for Jefe
Carry-over: 4 files with TS errors need cleanup (structured-data.examples.ts + 3 learn guides)
